<user_query>
You need to create 5 files for the "Chinese Tech" brand design style in a Cursor Skill located at `C:\Users\016551\.cursor\skills\dante-website-product-ui\`. This style represents OPPO, Huawei, Soundcore, Oladance, and Cleer brands.

## Source Material: Chinese Tech Design Patterns

Key characteristics:
- **Colors**: Dark immersive backgrounds (#000, #111, #1a1a1a) throughout. White text for titles, light gray (#999, #bbb) for body. Minimal accent colors — product color is the only color variable. Occasional gradient light effects (Soundcore). CTA buttons vary by brand (brand color or black fill).
- **Typography**: System sans-serif fonts. Hero H1: 48-72px Bold. Data Callout numbers: 64-120px Extra Bold (THE largest of any style). H2: 36-48px. H3: 24-32px. Body: 16-18px light gray. Caption/Footnote: 12-14px.
- **Layout**: One-feature-per-full-screen (Feature-per-Screen). Average 12-18 sections per page. Giant data callouts as visual anchors. Combined marketing+purchase page (Soundcore style) or separate marketing/buy (Huawei/Oladance style).
- **Page structure**: Hero (dark + floating product render) → Core Tech 1 → Core Tech 2 → Core Tech 3 → ANC → Calls → Design → Battery → Connectivity → App → Compare Table → FAQ → Footnotes (15-18 per page).
- **Copy style**: Engineering narrative priority. Tech version numbering (Pure Voice 2.0, Intelligent ANC 3.0). Explicit generational comparison with predecessors. Self-created branded terminology. Mix of technical depth + sensory language. OPPO: "震撼你的DNA", "听见歌手呼吸". Huawei: "传输效率提升4倍".
- **Unique elements**: Giant data callouts (biggest numbers), one-feature-per-screen, tech versioning, predecessor comparison, extensive footnotes (15-18), certification/collaboration logo displays, brand philosophy blocks.
- **CTA**: Varies — "Buy Now" (Huawei), "Add to Cart" (Soundcore), "Watch the Film" (OPPO), dual CTA "Buy Now + Learn More" (Oladance)
- **Border radius**: 12-20px for cards, 30-40px for CTA buttons (varies by brand)
- **Section spacing**: 80-120px between sections. Each feature section designed for full viewport height.

## Format Reference

Follow the format of the existing Shokz reference files in the same directory. Each file should be self-contained markdown with clear headers, CSS code blocks, HTML snippets, tables, and copy-paste-ready code.

## Files to Create

### 1. `references/chinese-tech-design-tokens.md`
CSS variables in `:root {}`:
- Colors: --bg-primary: #000; --bg-secondary: #111; --bg-tertiary: #1a1a1a; --text-primary: #fff; --text-secondary: #999; --text-body: #bbb; --accent-gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); --cta-primary: #1a1a1a; --cta-text: #fff; --border: #333; --footnote: #666;
- Typography: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif
- Layout: max-width: 1200px; section-padding: 100px 0; section-min-height: 100vh (viewport-height sections)
- Data callout numbers: font-size: clamp(64px, 10vw, 120px); font-weight: 800
- Responsive: @media (max-width: 1024px) and (max-width: 768px)

Typography scale, border radius, spacing tables. Color usage rules. Responsive breakpoint code.

### 2. `references/chinese-tech-components.md`
HTML+CSS snippets for:
1. Hero-Immersive (full-viewport dark, floating product render center, title + tech pills bar + CTA)
2. Tech-Pills-Bar (horizontal badges: "LHDC 4.0 / Bone Mic / Dual Driver / ANC / Dynaudio" style)
3. Data-Callout-Panel (giant numbers grid: "2x / +67% / +80% / 96kHz" with labels and comparison baselines)
4. Feature-Full-Screen (one feature per viewport: H2 title + body + data callout + product image, dark bg)
5. Feature-Split-Dark (50/50 text + image on dark background)
6. Predecessor-Comparison (side-by-side bars: "vs [Previous Model]" with percentage improvement bars)
7. Tech-Version-Badge ("Pure Voice 2.0" / "ANC 3.0" styled badges)
8. Certification-Logos-Bar (Hi-Res / LDAC / Dynaudio / Red Dot Award logos row)
9. Battery-Callout (large hours number + fast-charge equation: "10 min = 4 hrs")
10. Brand-Philosophy-Block (3-pillar brand values: Connection / Singularity / Human Centric)
11. Compare-Table (self-family comparison, 4-6 columns)
12. FAQ-Accordion (expandable Q&A)
13. Footnotes-Block (15-18 numbered footnotes, very detailed)
Each with complete HTML + CSS.

### 3. `references/chinese-tech-copy-patterns.md`
Copy patterns covering:
- Headline formulas: [Tech Name] + [Sensory Promise] ("Ultralight Diaphragms Immerse You in Deep Bass"), version-numbered tech names ("Intelligent ANC 3.0"), sensory short phrases ("Hear Beyond Sensation")
- Data callout writing: comparison type (2x vs previous gen), absolute type (98.5%), conversion type (50H = 1,000 songs, 10min = 4hrs)
- Body text rules: engineering narrative priority, first-person plural for R&D ("We have re-optimized..."), precise material specs (0.0095mm, 0.033mm), tech-then-benefit structure
- Tech version naming convention: [Brand Term] [Version Number] (Pure Voice 2.0, Adaptive ANC 2.0)
- Predecessor comparison format: "比 [Previous Model] 提升 XX%" / "XX% improvement over [Previous Model]"
- Certification/collaboration mentions: where and how to display Hi-Res, LDAC, Dynaudio, etc.
- CTA wording variations by sub-brand
- Footnote format: numbered superscript in text, detailed test conditions at bottom
- Tone: confident engineering authority, mix of Chinese sensory writing ("震撼你的DNA") with Western technical precision
Include specific examples from OPPO, Huawei, Soundcore, Oladance.

### 4. `references/chinese-tech-page-structures.md`
Single combined page type (marketing + optional purchase at top):
- Optional Purchase Bar (price + color selector + Add to Cart — Soundcore style)
- Hero (full-viewport dark + floating product + tech pills)
- Core Feature sections x 3-5 (each full-viewport, one feature per screen)
- Data Comparison Panel (vs predecessor, 4-6 metrics)
- Secondary features x 3-5 (can be condensed)
- Design/Materials section
- Battery section (giant hours + fast charge equation)
- Connectivity/App section
- Certification bar
- Compare Table (self-family, 4-6 products)
- FAQ accordion
- Footnotes (15-18 items)

Section selection matrix by product tier (flagship vs mid vs entry).
Deep-dive section ordering rules.

### 5. `assets/chinese-tech-product-page-skeleton.html`
Complete standalone HTML file with:
- All CSS inline in `<style>`
- Full dark theme throughout
- Each feature section designed for min-height: 100vh (viewport-filling)
- Giant data callout numbers (64-120px)
- Tech pills bar in hero
- Predecessor comparison section with visual bars
- Certification logos bar
- Battery callout with fast-charge equation
- FAQ accordion with JS toggle
- 15+ numbered footnotes
- Full responsive design (@media 1024px and 768px)
- Placeholder content with [Image: description]
- Should be openable directly in browser

IMPORTANT: Create ALL 5 files. Make them production-quality and self-contained. Use forward slashes in markdown paths.
</user_query>

input.contents:
# Chinese Tech Product Page — Copy Patterns

工程叙事优先，技术版本号驱动，代际对比为锚点。混合中式感官写作和西方技术精确度。代表品牌：OPPO、华为、Soundcore、Oladance、Cleer。

---

## 1. Hero 标语公式

Hero 标语分两层：H1 产品名 + 副标题（感官短语或技术承诺）。

| 公式类型 | 示例 | 来源品牌 |
|----------|------|----------|
| 技术名 + 感官承诺 | "Ultralight Diaphragms. Immersive Deep Bass." | Soundcore |
| 感官短语（≤4 词） | "Hear Beyond Sensation" / "听见，不止于声" | OPPO |
| 技术世代声明 | "Intelligent ANC 3.0. Silence, Evolved." | 华为 |
| 体验宣言 | "Open Your World" / "Music Without Walls" | Oladance |
| 数字锚点 + 承诺 | "50H. Unstoppable Sound." | Soundcore |

**规则**：
- 副标题 ≤ 8 词
- 不用感叹号（"!" 降低技术权威感）
- 可中英混排，但 H1 产品名统一英文
- 感官词优先于功能词："Immerse" > "Noise Cancellation"

---

## 2. 章节标题公式

每个全屏功能 section 的 H2：

| 类型 | 示例 | 适用场景 |
|------|------|----------|
| **技术版本 + 感官结果** | "Intelligent ANC 3.0 — Silence, Redefined." | ANC 章节 |
| **材料/工艺 + 效果** | "0.0095mm Titanium Diaphragm. Feel Every Breath." | 声学章节 |
| **数字开头** | "4× Transmission. Zero Interruption." | 连接章节 |
| **动词 + 感官** | "Hear the Singer Breathe." / "听见歌手的呼吸" | 音质章节 |
| **最高级声明** | "Our Most Advanced Driver System." | 旗舰声学 |
| **对比暗示** | "Where Others Stop, We Begin." | 品牌哲学章节 |

### Tech Version Tag（版本号标签）

每个功能 section H2 上方放技术版本标签：

```
[Pure Voice 2.0]
────────────────
Crystal Calls, Any Environment.
```

---

## 3. 数据大字报文案

Chinese Tech 风格的核心文案手法——数字是整个页面最大的视觉元素。

### 三种数据类型

| 类型 | 格式 | 示例 |
|------|------|------|
| **倍数/百分比对比** | `Nx` / `+XX%` + 对比基准 | "2× bass depth vs [Previous Model]" |
| **绝对值** | 数字 + 单位 | "96kHz Hi-Res" / "50H total battery" |
| **换算型** | 等式形式 | "10 min = 4 hrs" / "50H = 1,000 songs" |

### 写法规则

- 倍数和百分比**必带对比基准**："传输效率提升 4 倍"后面必须跟 "vs 标准蓝牙" 或 "相比 [Previous Model]"
- 绝对值可以不带基准，但鼓励添加语境："96kHz — Hi-Res Audio Wireless certified"
- 换算型用于让抽象数字变直觉："50 小时 = 北京到纽约往返航程"
- 单位缩写统一：H（小时）、min（分钟）、mm（毫米）、dB（分贝）、Hz/kHz（频率）
- 数字用阿拉伯数字，不拼写

### 跨品牌大字报样本

| 品牌 | 数字 | 注释 | 基准 |
|------|------|------|------|
| 华为 | 4× | transmission efficiency | vs standard Bluetooth |
| OPPO | 0.0095mm | titanium composite diaphragm | — |
| Soundcore | +67% | noise cancellation depth | vs Space A40 |
| Soundcore | 50H | total battery life | with charging case |
| Oladance | 2× | bass depth | vs OWS 1 |
| Cleer | 96kHz/24bit | Hi-Res wireless audio | LDAC certified |
| 华为 | -45dB | peak noise reduction | internal lab testing |
| OPPO | 0.033mm | ultra-thin dome | — |

---

## 4. 正文写作规则

### 工程叙事优先

Chinese Tech 正文遵循 "tech-then-benefit" 结构：先讲技术原理，再引出用户感受。

```
[技术原理句] + [用户感受句]

"The dual-layer titanium composite diaphragm measures just 0.0095mm — thinner than a human hair.
You hear details that disappear on ordinary earphones: the guitarist's fingers sliding across strings,
the singer's breath between phrases."
```

### 语气特征

- **第一人称复数用于研发叙事**："We re-optimized the acoustic chamber from the ground up" / "我们从零重新设计了声学腔体"
- **精确材料规格**：0.0095mm、0.033mm、50.6mm、14.2mm——数字越精确越好
- **版本号密集**：每提到一个核心技术都标版本号（Pure Voice 2.0、Adaptive ANC 2.0）
- **代际对比随处可见**："比上代提升 67%" / "67% improvement over the previous generation"
- **混合感官 + 技术**：同一段内同时存在 "震撼你的 DNA" 和 "14.2mm 超线性双动圈"

### 正文长度参考

| 位置 | 典型长度 |
|------|----------|
| Hero 副标题 | 3-8 词 |
| Tech Pills | 每条 1-4 词 |
| 全屏功能 section 正文 | 2-4 句，50-100 词 |
| Split section 正文 | 2-3 句，40-80 词 |
| Data callout 注释 | 1 行，≤ 15 词 |
| Data callout 基准 | 1 行，≤ 12 词 |
| Footnote | 1-3 句，含完整测试条件 |

---

## 5. 技术版本命名规范

| 格式 | 示例 | 备注 |
|------|------|------|
| [品牌自创术语] [版本号] | Pure Voice 2.0 | 自创品牌术语 + 小数点版本号 |
| [品牌自创术语] [版本号] | Intelligent ANC 3.0 | 华为风格 |
| [技术类型] [版本号] | Adaptive ANC 2.0 | 通用技术类型 + 版本号 |
| [编解码协议] [版本号] | LHDC 5.0 | 行业协议版本 |
| [品牌自创术语]（无版本号） | DualStream Technology | 不需要代际对比时 |

**规则**：
- 旗舰产品的核心技术必须带版本号——传达迭代感
- 版本号升级时必须同时告诉用户"比上代提升了什么"
- 自创术语首字母大写，用作专有名词

---

## 6. 代际对比文案格式

### 中文格式

```
比 [上代型号] [指标]提升 XX%
比 [上代型号] [指标]提升 X 倍
相比 [上代型号]，[指标]增加了 XX%
```

### 英文格式

```
XX% improvement over [Previous Model]
X× [metric] vs [Previous Model]
XX% [better/deeper/faster] than [Previous Model]
```

### 示例

| 中文 | 英文 |
|------|------|
| 比 FreeBuds Pro 2 降噪深度提升 67% | 67% deeper noise cancellation vs FreeBuds Pro 2 |
| 传输效率提升 4 倍 | 4× transmission efficiency |
| 比上代低频下潜增加 80% | 80% deeper bass extension vs previous generation |

---

## 7. 认证与合作品牌文案

### 在页面中的位置

1. **Tech Pills Bar**：作为胶囊标签出现（"Hi-Res" / "LDAC" / "Dynaudio"）
2. **Certification Logos Bar**：独立 section，logo + 名称横排
3. **正文内提及**：功能段落中自然融入

### 写法

- Logo 栏用法定全称："Hi-Res Audio Wireless" / "LDAC™" / "Co-tuned by Dynaudio"
- 正文内可用简称："Hi-Res certified" / "LDAC support"
- 合作品牌用 "Co-tuned by" / "Co-engineered with"（不说 "made by"）
- 设计奖用 "Winner of [Award Name]"

---

## 8. CTA 文案变体

| 品牌风格 | 主 CTA | 副 CTA | 备注 |
|----------|--------|--------|------|
| 华为 | Buy Now | Learn More | 标准大小写 |
| Soundcore | Add to Cart | Learn More | 标准大小写 |
| OPPO | Watch the Film / Buy Now | Explore More | 旗舰用视频 CTA |
| Oladance | Buy Now | Learn More | 双 CTA 并排 |
| Cleer | Shop Now | Explore | 标准大小写 |

**策略**：
- 主 CTA 用实色填充按钮（白底黑字 或 品牌色底白字）
- 副 CTA 用描边按钮（透明底 + border）
- Hero 双 CTA 并排；section 内只放文字链接

---

## 9. 脚注文案格式

Chinese Tech 页面脚注数量为所有风格最多（15-18 条）。

### 正文中的上标引用

```html
Battery life up to 50 hours with charging case.<sup>1</sup>
```

### 脚注格式

```
1. Battery life tested with [codec], ANC off, [volume level], at [temperature].
   Actual results may vary based on usage patterns, settings, and environmental factors.
2. "67% noise cancellation improvement" based on broadband ANC measurement
   comparing [Current Model] vs [Previous Model] under identical laboratory conditions.
3. Hi-Res Audio certification requires compatible source device and LDAC or LHDC codec connection.
```

### 脚注内容分类

| 类型 | 典型内容 | 数量 |
|------|----------|------|
| 续航测试条件 | 编解码、ANC 状态、音量、温度 | 2-3 条 |
| 性能对比基准 | 对比型号、测试方法、测试环境 | 3-5 条 |
| 认证/规格说明 | 协议兼容要求、IP 等级测试条件 | 2-3 条 |
| 合作品牌声明 | 合作范围说明（调音 vs 制造） | 1-2 条 |
| 功能限制说明 | 多点连接条件、App 兼容性 | 2-3 条 |
| 法律声明 | 商标、免责 | 1-2 条 |

---

## 10. 语气微调规则

| 品牌/产品线 | 语气方向 | 关键词示例 |
|-------------|---------|------------|
| OPPO（旗舰） | 感官诗意 + 工程深度 | "震撼你的 DNA" / "听见歌手呼吸" / "0.0095mm 钛合金振膜" |
| 华为（技术权威） | 精确数据 + 系统化叙事 | "传输效率提升 4 倍" / "Intelligent ANC 3.0" / "全链路" |
| Soundcore（性价比旗舰） | 数据密集 + 直接 | "+67% ANC depth" / "50H battery" / "Hi-Res Wireless certified" |
| Oladance（开放式） | 体验哲学 + 轻松 | "Open Your World" / "Music Without Walls" / "Connection" |
| Cleer（音频发烧） | 发烧级术语 + 精致 | "96kHz/24bit" / "Balanced Armature + Dynamic" / "Reference Tuning" |

---

## 11. 措辞禁区

- 不用 "revolutionary"——用 "re-engineered" / "next-generation" / 版本号升级
- 不用 "best in class" 无数据支撑——用具体数字 "67% improvement"
- 不用 "world's first" 除非有可验证来源
- 不用 "we promise"——用 "engineered to" / "designed for"
- 不用 "affordable"——用 "accessible" 或直接标价
- 感叹号极少使用——技术权威感不靠标点

# Chinese Tech Product Page — Page Structures

全暗沉浸式长卷轴，一屏一功能，12-18 个 section。营销叙事与购买入口合一（Soundcore 模式）或分离（华为/Oladance 模式）。

---

## 页面类型

Chinese Tech 品牌存在两种模式：

| 模式 | 代表品牌 | 购买入口 | URL 数量 |
|------|----------|----------|----------|
| **合一型** | Soundcore、Cleer | 页面顶部内嵌购买栏（价格 + 颜色 + Add to Cart） | 1 个 URL |
| **分离型** | 华为、Oladance、OPPO | 营销长页单独 URL，购买页单独 URL | 2 个 URL |

两种模式共享相同的营销 section 序列，区别仅在于是否在页面顶部嵌入购买栏。

---

## 完整区块序列

| 序号 | 区块 | 说明 | 最小高度 |
|------|------|------|----------|
| 0 | **Purchase Bar**（合一型） | 价格 + 颜色选择器 + Add to Cart（Soundcore 模式） | auto |
| 1 | **Hero-Immersive** | 全屏暗底 + 浮空产品渲染 + 标题 + Tech Pills + CTA | 100vh |
| 2 | **Tech Pills Bar** | 水平胶囊卖点条（可合并入 Hero） | auto |
| 3 | **Core Feature 1** | 全屏功能深潜——通常是声学/驱动单元 | 100vh |
| 4 | **Core Feature 2** | 全屏功能深潜——通常是 ANC | 100vh |
| 5 | **Core Feature 3** | 全屏功能深潜——通常是通话/麦克风 | 100vh |
| 6 | **Data Comparison Panel** | 代际对比——4-6 个指标的百分比进度条 | 100vh |
| 7 | **Core Feature 4**（旗舰） | 全屏功能深潜——连接/编解码 | 100vh |
| 8 | **Core Feature 5**（旗舰） | 全屏功能深潜——佩戴/设计 | 100vh |
| 9 | **Data Callout Panel** | 4 格大字报数字网格 | auto |
| 10 | **Secondary Feature A** | 次要功能——可双列或紧凑排布 | auto |
| 11 | **Secondary Feature B** | 次要功能——App/多点连接 | auto |
| 12 | **Battery Section** | 大号续航数字 + 快充等式 | 100vh |
| 13 | **Design/Materials** | 材质/配色/工艺 | 100vh |
| 14 | **Certification Bar** | Hi-Res / LDAC / Dynaudio / Award logo 横排 | auto |
| 15 | **Brand Philosophy**（可选） | 三柱品牌价值观 | auto |
| 16 | **Compare Table** | 自家产品线对比，4-6 列 | auto |
| 17 | **FAQ Accordion** | 8-12 个问题 | auto |
| 18 | **Footnotes** | 15-18 条详细脚注 | auto |

---

## Hero-Immersive 详细结构

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                 全暗背景 (#000)                         │
│              ┌─ 渐变光晕 (可选) ─┐                      │
│                                                       │
│              H1: [PRODUCT NAME]                       │
│          Subtitle: [Sensory Tagline]                  │
│                                                       │
│    ┌─ Tech Pills ────────────────────────────┐        │
│    │ LHDC 5.0 │ Bone Mic │ ANC 3.0 │ IP55  │        │
│    └─────────────────────────────────────────┘        │
│                                                       │
│           ┌──────────────────────┐                    │
│           │  [浮空产品渲染图]     │                    │
│           │  大尺寸、居中、无背景  │                    │
│           └──────────────────────┘                    │
│                                                       │
│          [Buy Now]    [Learn More]                    │
│                                                       │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 全屏功能 Section 内部模式

### 模式 A — 居中全屏（Feature-Full-Screen）

Tech Version Tag 居中 → H2 居中 → 正文居中 → 产品图居中 → Data Callout 居中。

适用：声学、ANC、电池——页面中最重要的 3-5 个功能。

### 模式 B — 左右分栏（Feature-Split-Dark）

左侧文字（Tag + H2 + Body + 内联 Data）+ 右侧产品图。暗色背景。

适用：通话、连接、佩戴——重要但非核心的功能。

### 模式 C — 数据大字报面板（Data-Callout-Panel）

4 格网格，每格一个超大数字 + 注释 + 基准。

适用：章节间的数据锚点，或代际对比集中展示。

### 模式 D — 代际对比条（Predecessor-Comparison）

H2 + 副标题（"vs [Previous Model]"）+ 4-6 条百分比进度条。

适用：产品发布期间，强调代际升级幅度。

### 模式 E — 品牌哲学三柱（Brand-Philosophy-Block）

三列，编号 01/02/03 + H3 + 短文。

适用：页面中后段，传达品牌价值观。

---

## 章节典型顺序

```
声学/驱动 → ANC/通透 → 通话/麦克风 → 代际对比面板
→ 连接/编解码 → 佩戴/设计 → 数据大字报 → 电池
→ App/多点连接 → 认证栏 → 品牌哲学 → 对比表 → FAQ → 脚注
```

---

## 按产品定位的 Section 选择矩阵

| Section | 旗舰 | 中端 | 入门 |
|---------|------|------|------|
| Hero-Immersive | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Tech Pills Bar | ✓（6 条） | ✓（5 条） | ✓（4 条） |
| 声学 Full-Screen | ✓（深度） | ✓（标准） | ✓（简化） |
| ANC Full-Screen | ✓（深度） | ✓（标准） | ✗ 或简化 |
| 通话 Split | ✓ | ✓ | ✗ |
| Predecessor Comparison | ✓ | ✓ | ✗ |
| 连接 Full-Screen | ✓ | Split | ✗ |
| 佩戴/设计 Full-Screen | ✓ | Split | ✗ |
| Data Callout Panel | ✓（4 格） | ✓（3 格） | ✓（2 格） |
| Battery Section | ✓（大字报+等式） | ✓（大字报） | ✓（简化） |
| App/多点连接 | ✓ | ✓ | ✗ |
| Certification Bar | ✓ | ✓ | ✗ |
| Brand Philosophy | ✓（旗舰） | ✗ | ✗ |
| Compare Table | ✓（6 列） | ✓（4 列） | ✓（3 列） |
| FAQ | ✓（10-12 条） | ✓（8-10 条） | ✓（5-8 条） |
| Footnotes | ✓（15-18 条） | ✓（10-12 条） | ✓（6-8 条） |
| **总 Section 数** | **16-18** | **12-14** | **8-10** |

---

## 深浅交替规则

Chinese Tech 风格**不使用浅色背景**。"交替"通过三级暗色实现：

| 层级 | 颜色 | 用途 |
|------|------|------|
| 第一层 | #000000 (--bg-primary) | 主要 section、Hero |
| 第二层 | #111111 (--bg-secondary) | 交替 section、FAQ |
| 第三层 | #1a1a1a (--bg-tertiary) | 认证栏、次要区块 |

交替规则：相邻 section 不用相同背景色，在三级暗色间切换。

---

## 购买栏结构（合一型）

仅 Soundcore/Cleer 模式使用，位于 Hero 上方：

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  [产品名]  │  $XX.XX  │  颜色: ● ● ●  │  [Add to Cart]  │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

购买栏为 sticky（滚动时固定在顶部），背景 `--bg-tertiary`，高度紧凑（56-64px）。

---

## Section 间距规则

| 场景 | 间距 |
|------|------|
| 全屏 section 之间 | 0（各自 min-height: 100vh） |
| 非全屏 section 之间 | 80-120px padding |
| Hero 到第一个功能 section | 0（紧接） |
| 最后功能 section 到 Compare Table | 100px |
| FAQ 到 Footnotes | 48px |

LHDC 5.0 Bone Conduction Mic Dual Dynamic Driver Intelligent ANC 3.0 Dynaudio Co-tuned IP55

DualStream Driver 2.0

Dual 14.2mm ultra-linear dynamic drivers with a 0.0095mm titanium composite diaphragm — thinner than a human hair. The custom acoustic chamber is re-engineered from the ground up, delivering 2× bass depth and crystalline treble detail across the full 20Hz–40kHz spectrum.1

Our Philosophy

01

Connection

Sound bridges the gap between people. We engineer audio that brings you closer to the music, the moment, and each other.

02

Singularity

03

Human Centric

Technology serves the human experience. Every gram, every decibel, every curve is calibrated to how you live.

Find Your Match

ANCIntelligent ANC 3.0Adaptive ANC 2.0Basic ANCAdaptive ANC 2.0
Battery (total)50H40H30H36H
CodecLDAC, LHDC 5.0LDAC, AACAAC, SBCLDAC, AAC
IP RatingIP55IP54IPX4IP57
Weight (per ear)5.2g5.8g4.5g6.1g

FAQ

What audio codecs are supported?
Supports LDAC, LHDC 5.0, AAC, and SBC. Hi-Res Audio Wireless certified with up to 96kHz/24bit transmission via LDAC or LHDC 5.0. Codec availability depends on your source device and OS version.
How does the adaptive ANC work?
The Intelligent ANC 3.0 system uses a dual-mic hybrid architecture (feed-forward + feedback) that scans ambient noise 200 times per second and adjusts cancellation depth in real time. Three manual modes — Deep, Comfort, Wind Shield — are available via the companion app.
What is the actual battery life?
8 hours per single charge with ANC on (LDAC, 50% volume). Up to 10 hours with ANC off. The charging case provides 5 additional charges for up to 50 hours total. 10-minute fast charge delivers approximately 4 hours of playback.
Is it compatible with both iOS and Android?
Full Bluetooth 5.3 compatibility with iOS 14+ and Android 9+. The companion app is available on both platforms. Multipoint connection supports simultaneous pairing with 2 devices.
How does the bone conduction microphone improve call quality?
The bone conduction sensor picks up vocal vibrations directly through jaw contact, bypassing ambient noise entirely. Combined with dual beamforming microphones and AI noise suppression, it delivers clear voice transmission even in wind speeds up to 40km/h.
What is the IP55 rating?
IP55 means protection against dust ingress and low-pressure water jets from any direction. Suitable for workouts and rain, but not designed for swimming or submersion.
What ear tip sizes are included?
Three sizes (S/M/L) of liquid silicone ear tips with memory foam core. The companion app includes an ear tip fit test to help you find the optimal seal for best ANC performance and comfort.
Can I customize touch controls?
Yes. Double-tap, triple-tap, and long-press actions are fully customizable via the companion app. Default mappings: double-tap for play/pause, triple-tap for next track, long-press for ANC mode toggle.
What does "Co-tuned by Dynaudio" mean?
The audio profile was collaboratively tuned with Dynaudio's acoustic engineers for balanced frequency response and natural timbre. Dynaudio participated in tuning and validation; the drivers are manufactured in-house.
How does it compare to [Previous Model]?
Key improvements: 67% deeper noise cancellation, 2× bass depth, 4× Bluetooth transmission efficiency, and 50% longer battery life. The driver, ANC system, microphone, and Bluetooth chipset are all new-generation components.
  1. Dual 14.2mm drivers use a titanium composite diaphragm measuring 0.0095mm. Frequency response: 20Hz–40kHz. Tested in anechoic chamber per IEC 60268-7.
  2. "2× bass depth" refers to low-frequency SPL measured at 50Hz, compared to [Previous Model] under identical test conditions.
  3. Intelligent ANC 3.0 uses dual-microphone hybrid feed-forward/feedback topology. Environmental scanning rate: 200 Hz. Three user-selectable modes plus auto mode.
  4. Peak noise reduction of -45dB measured at 200Hz using pink noise in laboratory conditions per ANSI S12.42.
  5. "67% deeper noise cancellation" based on broadband ANC measurement (100Hz–1kHz) comparing [Current Model] vs [Previous Model] under identical laboratory conditions.
  6. Bone-conduction microphone detects vocal vibrations via jaw contact. AI noise suppression model trained on 100M+ audio samples covering 150+ noise scenarios.
  7. "3× voice clarity" based on PESQ (Perceptual Evaluation of Speech Quality) score comparison vs [Previous Model] in 65dB ambient noise environment.
  8. LHDC 5.0 requires compatible source device. Transmission rate up to 900kbps. Dual-device multipoint connection supports simultaneous pairing with 2 Bluetooth devices; seamless switching may require compatible OS.
  9. 96kHz/24bit Hi-Res wireless audio requires LDAC or LHDC codec and compatible source device. Actual audio quality depends on source material and connection stability.
  10. Weight: 5.2g per earbud (without ear tip). Ear shape analysis based on 10,000 anonymized ear canal measurement data points.
  11. Total 50-hour battery life = single charge (8hrs ANC on) + charging case (5 additional charges). Measured with AAC codec, ANC off, 50% volume at 25°C. Actual results vary.
  12. Fast charge: 10-minute USB-C charge provides approximately 4 hours of playback. Tested with ANC off, AAC codec, 50% volume. Full charge: approximately 1.5 hours (earbuds), 2 hours (case).
  13. Companion app available on iOS 14+ and Android 9+. Features and availability may vary by platform and region. Firmware updates delivered via app.
  14. IP55 rating tested per IEC 60529 under controlled laboratory conditions. Dust protection: limited ingress permitted. Water protection: low-pressure jets from any direction. Not designed for swimming or submersion.
  15. Dynaudio co-tuning: acoustic tuning and validation conducted in collaboration with Dynaudio acoustic engineers. Driver units manufactured by [Brand]. Dynaudio does not manufacture the drivers.
  16. Bluetooth 5.3 with support for LDAC, LHDC 5.0, AAC, and SBC codecs. Effective range: up to 15m (open space). Actual range may vary by environment and interference.
  17. Red Dot Design Award [Year]. Product evaluated on innovation, functionality, formal quality, and ergonomics.
  18. Product specifications and availability subject to change without notice. All trademarks are property of their respective owners. LDAC is a trademark of Sony Corporation. Hi-Res Audio is a trademark of Japan Audio Society.

input.final_summary: 5 个 Chinese Tech 风格文件已全部创建完成：design-tokens（CSS 变量 + 字体阶梯 + 响应式断点）、components（14 个组件含完整 HTML+CSS）、copy-patterns（标题公式 + 大字报写法 + 脚注格式 + 11 条规则）、page-structures（区块序列 + 产品定位选择矩阵 + 深浅交替规则）、skeleton HTML（全暗沉浸式长卷轴，含 FAQ JS 交互 + 18 条脚注 + 完整响应式）。格式与现有 Beats/Bose/Apple 参考文件一致。

content.text:
5 个文件全部创建完成，格式与现有 Beats/Bose/Apple 参考文件保持一致：

| 文件 | 路径 | 内容概要 |
|------|------|----------|
| Design Tokens | `references/chinese-tech-design-tokens.md` | CSS 变量（三级暗色 + 文字三级灰度 + 产品色变量）、字体阶梯（含 64-120px 大字报）、间距表、响应式断点、色彩使用规则 |
| Components | `references/chinese-tech-components.md` | 14 个组件：Hero-Immersive、Tech-Pills-Bar、Data-Callout-Panel、Feature-Full-Screen、Feature-Split-Dark、Predecessor-Comparison、Tech-Version-Badge、Certification-Logos-Bar、Battery-Callout、Brand-Philosophy-Block、Compare-Table、FAQ-Accordion、Footnotes-Block、Shared Utilities |
| Copy Patterns | `references/chinese-tech-copy-patterns.md` | Hero 标语公式、章节标题公式、大字报三种数据类型写法、工程叙事正文规则、技术版本命名规范、代际对比文案格式（中英双版）、CTA 变体、脚注格式（15-18 条分类）、5 品牌语气微调表、措辞禁区 |
| Page Structures | `references/chinese-tech-page-structures.md` | 合一型/分离型两种模式、18 区块完整序列、5 种 section 内部模式、章节典型顺序、按旗舰/中端/入门的选择矩阵、三级暗色交替规则、间距规则 |
| HTML Skeleton | `assets/chinese-tech-product-page-skeleton.html` | 完整独立 HTML，全暗沉浸式，含 Hero（渐变光晕 + Tech Pills）、3 个核心功能全屏 section、代际对比进度条、Split 分栏、大字报面板、电池等式、认证栏、品牌哲学、对比表、10 条 FAQ（JS 交互）、18 条脚注、完整 1024px/768px 响应式 |
